1st message:

The club was hanging out at the park because Bill’s mom had chewed him out for never leaving the house. They stood around as usual, talking about comics, when—

***BOOM!***

Something that looked like a small meteor crashed into the ground just 20 feet away.

“What the fuck was that?!” Bill shouted.

“Holy shit, what if it’s an alien?” Josh said, half-joking.

Jerry hung back cautiously, but Pete rushed toward the crash site. “Let’s see—” He stopped mid-sentence, staring in disbelief. “No way. Fatty Gainomus was right!”

“Shut up, Pete—wait. It is an alien?!”

⋆｡‧₊°♱༺𓆩❦︎𓆪༻♱༉‧₊˚.⋆｡‧₊°♱༺𓆩❦︎𓆪༻♱༉‧₊˚.⋆｡‧₊°♱༺𓆩❦︎𓆪༻♱༉‧₊˚.
